items.title: TRIPLE THREAT: Will Black, Bryce Young, and Khary Adams
items.summary: Everyone loves to do a player countdown for Notre Dame as we face toward the college football season, but in all fairness, the offseason is much shorter than you think. It’s really only two months in the grand scheme of things, and there will be much more to talk about in the middle of July […]

items.title: NCAA LACROSSE: Notre Dame loses to Princeton in the National Championship Game
items.summary: Overall, it was a fantastic season for the Notre Dame Men’s Lacrosse team. It was a season where they reigned as the #1 team for 7 weeks and beat the #1 team in the nation two games in a row — they just didn’t have another one in them on Monday in the National Championship […]

items.title: NCAA LACROSSE TOURNAMENT: Notre Dame crushes Syracuse to advance to Championship Game
items.summary: It’s been a chaotic Men’s Lacrosse season, but in the end, the top two teams in the country will face off on Monday for the National Championship. Princeton took care of Duke earlier in the day, and then Notre Dame dominated Syracuse with a 4th quarter attack to help send the Irish back to play […]

items.title: NCAA LACROSSE FINAL FOUR: Notre Dame vs Syracuse
items.summary: Notre Dame is in position to win another Men’s Lacrosse National Championship, and they’ve made it to the final four. Facing the Irish are the Syracuse Orange — for a little ACC on ACC crime. The Irish are the Orange (just a brutal period in history) will face off in Charlottesville at 2:30. LFG! GAME […]

items.title: Five Notre Dame Football Photos for a Friday: Forgotten Running Backs
items.summary: Notre Dame just sent Jeremiyah Love and Jadarian Price to the NFL via the first round of the NFL Draft. They are a pair of Irish running backs that will likely be talked about for a long time. As there is with any college football program, however, there are running backs that are seemingly never […]

items.title: Marcus Freeman is living in an absurd world
items.summary: College football is an absurd sport, and the lack of the triple option makes it even more so… let’s run it. THIS IS THE KING OF NOTRE DAME FOOTBALL Without a doubt, Notre Dame football has been on a different trajectory under the rule of Marcus Freeman. We were told certain things about what Notre […]
